recalls.Description: Astemrey is recalling its Y'all Can DIY bioethanol fireplace fuel containers due to a serious safety hazard. These containers, which come in clear bottles with black tops and feature a white and black label with orange and white text, do not meet mandatory safety standards. They are labeled with claims such as 'No Soot,' 'No Ash,' and 'Clean Burning,' but lack essential flame mitigation devices, increasing the risk of flash fires.
recalls.Title: Astemrey Recalls Y'all Can DIY Bioethanol Fireplace Fuel Containers Due to Flash Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Astemrey via email at contact@astemrey.com.

Products.Name: Y'all Can DIY Bioethanol Fireplace Fuel Containers

Images.Caption: Recalled Y'all Can DIY Liquid Bioethanol 1000ml fuel container
Recalled Y'all Can DIY Liquid Bioethanol 1000ml fuel full product label

Manufacturers.Name: STARKİM KİMYA SAN.TİC. A.Ş, of Turkey

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from April 2025 to July 2025, priced at approximately $19 for single packs and $31 for 3-packs.

Distributors.Name: STARKIM KIMYA SAN.TIC. A.S, of Turkey

Hazards.Name: Risk of flash fire due to lack of flame mitigation devices in violation of safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product, label it 'DO NOT USE,' and request a free replacement from Astemrey.

recalls.metaDescription: Astemrey recalls Y'all Can DIY bioethanol fireplace fuel containers due to flash fire hazards. Learn how to get a free replacement.

recalls.Description:
Scepter B62 gas and oil fuel containers are part of this recall due to serious safety concerns. These containers are red with black caps and yellow spouts, featuring dual chambers that hold 6 liters of gas on one side and 2.5 liters of oil on the other. The containers are marked with "Scepter" and "Essence Danger" on their sides. The design fails to meet safety standards, lacking necessary flame mitigation devices and child-resistant features, which increases the risk of flash fires and potential poisoning in children.

Consumers are urged to stop using these containers immediately and keep them away from children. To ensure safety, contact Pro Recycle for a no-cost return and full refund of the product.
recalls.Title: Scepter Fuel Containers Recalled for Fire and Poisoning Hazards; Non-Compliant with Safety Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please call Pro Recycle at 514-887-7309 from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET Monday through Friday or email prorecycle@hotmail.ca.

Products.Name: Scepter Gas and Oil Combination Fuel Containers

Images.Caption: Recalled Scepter B62 Gas and Oil Fuel Container – front
Recalled Scepter B62 Gas and Oil Fuel Container – side

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from September 2024 through July 2025 for approximately $40.

Importers.Name: Pro Recycle of Montreal, Quebec, Canada

Hazards.Name: Risk of flash fire due to lack of flame mitigation devices and potential poisoning from non-child-resistant spouts.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the containers, keep them away from children, and return them to Pro Recycle for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Scepter fuel containers due to fire and poisoning risks. Stop using and contact Pro Recycle for a full refund.

recalls.Description: BRS and BULin portable liquid fuel bottles are being recalled due to safety concerns. The BRS bottle features an orange body with a black cap, while the BULin bottle is red with a matching cap. Both bottles are available only in a 1000mL size and display product information in white lettering, including brand names and warnings. The text on the BULin bottle is in Chinese. These products are not compliant with child-resistant closure standards, increasing the risk of burns and poisoning for children.
recalls.Title: Recall of BRS and BULin Liquid Fuel Bottles Due to Burn and Poisoning Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please email squarebird@aliyun.com or visit their Amazon seller profile at https://www.amazon.com/s?me=A1778LF2VCKZ0J&marketplaceID=ATVPDKIKX0DER.

Images.Caption: Recalled BRS liquid fuel bottle – front
Recalled BRS liquid fuel bottle – back
Recalled BULin liquid fuel bottle – back

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from January 2023 to December 2023, priced between $10 and $13.

Hazards.Name: Non-compliance with child-resistant closure requirements, posing burn and poisoning hazards to children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled bottles, keep them away from children, and contact Tentock for disposal instructions to receive a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: BRS and BULin liquid fuel bottles recalled due to safety risks. Stop using them immediately and contact for a refund.
